lesson.subtitle: Aula 16 -- At the Airport -- Part 1
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Gabriela Paulucci | Aula 16 -- At the Airport -- Part 1

listenings.text: Good morning, everyone, and welcome to the airport. This is a boarding announcement for flight two zero five to London. Passengers, please go to gate fifteen now. Please have your passport and your boarding pass ready. Boarding starts in ten minutes. Please put your suitcase on the line, and keep your ticket in your hand. Thank you, and have a good flight.

Hi, I am Gabriela. Today I am at the airport for my first big trip. I have my passport, my ticket, and one small suitcase. First, I go to check-in. The agent looks at my passport and gives me my boarding pass. Then I look for the gate. My flight leaves from gate twelve. I am a little nervous, but I am very happy. I always check my boarding pass two times. Now I wait at the gate for my flight.

extra_audio.text: First, Gabriela arrives at the airport with her passport and her ticket. Then she goes to check-in and puts her suitcase on the line. The agent looks at her passport and gives her a boarding pass. After that, she walks to the gate. Finally, she waits at the gate for her flight to London.
